one. Reviewly's AI-crafted review options make it easy for customers to provide quick feedback. Why we've launched on Product Hunt: Engage with the community: Product Hunt is a fantastic platform to connect with forward-thinking entrepreneurs, marketers, and business owners like you. We look forward to meaningful conversations and valuable insights. Showcase innovation: Reviewly leverages cutting-edge AI technology to automate review collection, streamline communication, and generate personalized responses. We're proud to showcase our innovation here. Best regards, Mike Hardenbrook COO of Reviewly [...] Reviewly.ai

Report

•1 review

I can't say enough about Reviewly! This platform has completely transformed the way we manage our online reputation. The AI-powered features are incredibly effective, making it a breeze to collect and respond to reviews on Google. Our business has seen a substantial increase in positive reviews since we started using Reviewly, and it has had a direct impact on our online visibility and customer trust. The simplicity and efficiency of the platform are unmatched, and the support team is top-notch. They are always ready to assist and provide guidance. Reviewly is a game-changer for anyone looking to enhance their online reputation and attract more customers. I highly recommend it to businesses of all sizes.

## AI-Powered Google Review Management Software

5.0•8 reviews•

61 followers

Visit website

Marketing automation platforms

Reviewly.ai is an AI-powered Google review management platform that helps businesses collect and respond to reviews via SMS. With a 98% open rate, review requests reach customers instantly, and AI-generated review drafts make it easy for them to leave feedback in seconds. The platform generates smart, keyword-optimized responses that owners can approve and post from their phone. Built for local businesses, multi-location brands, and agencies with full white-label support

results.title: Kanwas: An open-source brain for your team | Product Hunt
results.content:
Anja Popovic
Kanwas

Kanwas

@josh\_bennett1 Thank you for the nice comment and referencing on chat interfaces and our angle!   
  
For quite a while we were struggling if canvas view is the best approach, but for all of us in the team it clicked from the start, and it was even hard to describe what exactly is making us to feel like that.   
  
Happy to see that many people resonate with it, and find it more natural than chat ones. I guess it simulates the way the brain works, and also the flow when we are at the desk with pen and papers.

Marek Vybíral
Kanwas

Kanwas [...] Johan Cutych
Kanwas

Kanwas

@predrag\_ristic1  @josh\_bennett1 EXACTLY! this comment warms my heart. Canvas is something we've put a lot of effort into and takes a lot of our focus, but I really love it for creative work where the work doesn't collapse.   
  
also everyone starts differently. Someone goes chaos first and then turn it into structure, others like to create structure first and keep it clean

Anja Popovic
Kanwas

Kanwas [...] Anja Popovic
Kanwas

Kanwas

@munevver\_ertuncccc I agree, that is definitely one of the things that we want to focus on a lot. AI is still not in the phase of taking care of it on its own, and on the other hand teams don't have time to manage and update it, so we are trying to find a balance of keeping people in the loop by making agent support this flow, until we can bet on the complete solution from ai side

Marek Vybíral
Kanwas

Kanwas

@munevver\_ertuncccc Yes, “living” i think is the keyword for us. Context that compouds as you use the tool, and context that is actually useful, because Kanwas agent and other AI agents can tap it easily.

Vikram

Product Hunt

Product Hunt

•5 reviews

I've been using Cycle ever since I joined Lazy and it's seriously changed the way I think about capturing feedback and making it actionable. Cycle makes it so easy to turn feedback into actionable insights that can be addressed in product incredibly quickly. All while still ensuring that your customers are kept in the loop when you launch features addressing their feedback 🙏 The team are fantastic too - incredibly attentive with teams using Cycle and always supportive to see how they can make feedback capture even better! If you haven't already I highly suggest checking them out - you won't regret it!

#### What's great

For a relatively new product I'm really impressed with how far I got automating web sessions. Go team!
